name: codex-app-server-web
description: Independent, open-source web control center compatible with Codex app-server workflows

scripts.start: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=production PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 SHOW_LAN_URLS=1 UI_COMMAND="node server.cjs" node start-all.cjs
scripts.start:reuse: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=production PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 SHOW_LAN_URLS=1 CODEX_REUSE_EXISTING=1 UI_COMMAND="node server.cjs" node start-all.cjs
scripts.start:prod: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && next build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 SHOW_LAN_URLS=1 node server.cjs
scripts.dev: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 UI_COMMAND="node server.cjs" node start-all.cjs
scripts.dev:reuse: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 CODEX_REUSE_EXISTING=1 UI_COMMAND="node server.cjs" node start-all.cjs
scripts.dev:lan: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 SHOW_LAN_URLS=1 UI_COMMAND="node server.cjs" node start-all.cjs
scripts.dev:ui: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 node server.cjs
scripts.smoke: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:1989 node scripts/smoke-control-center.mjs
